productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Washed Blue Shorts
description: Composition Dark blue denim shorts made of 100% cotton, has a looped waistband with an elasticated back, a hook and zipper closure, two insert pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing and brand name embroidered near the right insert pocket on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little brat ready for the outdoors with these blue denim shorts from palm tree. The looped waistband gives a great Fit, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. The stitch detailing and embroidered brand name adds to the style quotient. Team this with tees and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
